documentation.text:
@title ChessCore - Main chess game logic
 @notice Inherits from ChessBoard and implements move validation and game state
@notice Modifier to prevent re-initialization
@notice Empty constructor for implementation contract

@notice Register game completion in DisputeDAO for challenge window
 @dev Called automatically when game ends, starts the 48h challenge window
@notice Distribute rewards to both players after game ends
@notice Release bonds after challenge window (no dispute)
@notice Report game result to rating system
@notice Check if the challenge window has passed and no dispute is active

@notice Finalize game and allocate prizes (must be called before withdrawPrize)
 @dev Uses pull pattern to prevent locked funds if one player's address reverts

@notice Withdraw allocated prize (pull pattern)
 @dev Each player calls this to withdraw their prize after finalizePrizes()

@notice Legacy function for backward compatibility - finalizes and withdraws in one call
 @dev Only works for winner in win scenarios, not for draws
@notice Offer a draw to the opponent
@notice Accept a draw offer from the opponent
@notice Decline a draw offer
@notice Cancel your own draw offer
@notice Get current draw offer status

@notice Claim draw by threefold repetition
 @dev Can be called by either player when position has occurred 3+ times

@notice Claim draw by 50-move rule
 @dev Can be called by either player when 50 moves have passed without pawn move or capture
@notice Claim victory when opponent has not moved within timeout period
@notice Validates move and updates rook moved flags when rook moves
@notice Handle move result: check/mate detection, events, and dispute registration
@notice Detect check/checkmate state after a move

claimDrawByFiftyMoveRule().details: Can be called by either player when 50 moves have passed without pawn move or capture

claimDrawByRepetition().details: Can be called by either player when position has occurred 3+ times

claimPrize().details: Only works for winner in win scenarios, not for draws

debugCreative(uint8,uint8,int8).details: Only callable in Friendly mode, by white player, before game startsThis allows creative chess variants but is disabled in Tournament mode

finalizePrizes().details: Uses pull pattern to prevent locked funds if one player's address reverts

returns.maxRepetitions: Maximum times any position has occurred

returns.blackBlocksRemaining: Blocks remaining before black times out (0 if not their turn)
returns.whiteBlocksRemaining: Blocks remaining before white times out (0 if not their turn)

withdrawPrize().details: Each player calls this to withdraw their prize after finalizePrizes()

acceptDraw().notice: Accept a draw offer from the opponent

canClaimPrize().notice: Check if the challenge window has passed and no dispute is active

claimPrize().notice: Legacy function for backward compatibility - finalizes and withdraws in one call

claimVictoryByTimeout().notice: Claim victory when opponent has not moved within timeout period

debugCreative(uint8,uint8,int8).notice: Setup function for custom board positions (Friendly mode only)

finalizePrizes().notice: Finalize game and allocate prizes (must be called before withdrawPrize)

getBoardState().notice: Get entire board state in a single call (saves 63 RPC calls)

getTimeoutStatus().notice: Get timeout status for both players

initialize(address,uint256,uint8,uint8,u.notice: Initialize the game (called by factory on clones)

offerDraw().notice: Offer a draw to the opponent

printBoard().notice: Print board as string (deprecated - use getBoardState)

printChessBoardLayoutSVG().notice: Get SVG representation of the board

userdoc.notice: Inherits from ChessBoard and implements move validation and game state
